query:
ALTER TABLE quotes 
  ADD COLUMN transfer_proof_url TEXT NULL AFTER invoicePdfUrl,
  ADD COLUMN transfer_proof_key TEXT NULL AFTER transfer_proof_url,
  ADD COLUMN transfer_confirmed_at DATETIME NULL AFTER transfer_proof_key,
  ADD COLUMN transfer_confirmed_by VARCHAR(255) NULL AFTER transfer_confirmed_at,
  ADD COLUMN payment_method ENUM('redsys', 'transferencia', 'efectivo', 'otro') NULL AFTER transfer_confirmed_by;
